posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.

This is Jasmine - Community manager with monday.com. I’m excited to share nonprofit event with you featuring special guests GivingTuesday.

Date: Wednesday, October 9th 2024
Time: 2:00pm-7:00pm Location: 111 East 18th Street New York, New York 10003

Join the monday.com and GivingTuesday teams for a day of understanding. Using data sourced from GivingTuesday.org’s nonprofit community, the monday.com and GivingTuesday.org teams will co-lead a series of workshop sessions taking donor behavior data to holistic campaign building to practical donor relationship maintenance using tech

During this event, you will participate in the following sessions:

-Unleashing radical generosity - GivingTuesday as a Giving Moment
-Data driven strategies for GivingTuesday and beyond
-Human behavior intro technical solution using monday.com
-Nonprofit mingler and cocktail hour

A light lunch, snacks, and cocktails will be provided to participating nonprofits during the event. You are more than welcome to invite more than one person from your team and/or other nonprofit experts that you may know to this event. Use of the monday.com platform is not required to attend

Save the date post (2)1080×1080 88.5 KB

Register here: https://forms.monday.com/forms/1da3e91ff40b7aa052ce293b5c9d42e8?r=use1
